summary: 已按最小 formal patch 只显式覆盖 execution_spec.role_directory。PATCH 请求体中的 role_directory 值正确；PATCH 响应里存在两套 execution_spec 视图，其中 metadata_json.community_protocols.channel.layers.group.execution_spec.role_directory 已显示正确 UUID，但 PATCH 响应主 execution_spec.role_directory 仍为空，authoritative GET /protocol 读回的 execution_spec.role_directory 也仍为空。因此 role_directory 未 authoritative 生效，本轮没有继续重跑 step1 最小链。
blocker: Protocol patch ingestion mismatch: minimal formal PATCH returns 200 but authoritative GET /protocol still shows execution_spec.role_directory empty, so step1 role binding blocker remains.
tests: sent minimal GroupProtocolUpdateRequest with explicit execution_spec.role_directory only
captured authoritative GET /protocol execution_spec.role_directory and confirmed it remained empty
